description: The Neural Network of Your AI Team - AI Agent Operations Center

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:collector" "npm run dev:electron"

scripts.postinstall: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../collectors && npm install
